SEARCH
Package clientGui.reservation

Class ForgetCodeController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.reservation.ForgetCodeController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController
public class ForgetCodeController extends clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator implements MessageListener<Object>
Controller for the "Forgot Confirmation Code" functionality. Allows users to recover their reservation code via email or phone number.

  • Method Details

    • initData

      public void initData(ClientUi clientUi, CustomerType isSubscriberStatus, Integer subCode, Customer customer)
      Initializes the controller with necessary data.
      Parameters:
      clientUi - The client UI instance
      isSubscriberStatus - The customer type
      subCode - The subscriber code
      customer - The customer object

    • recoverReservationCode

      void recoverReservationCode(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Handles the "Recover" button click. Validates input (Email/Phone) and sends a request to recover the reservation code.
      Parameters:
      event - The action event

    • closePopup

      void closePopup(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Closes the popup window.
      Parameters:
      event - The action event

    • onMessageReceive

      public void onMessageReceive(Object msg)
      Handles server responses for the recovery request. Displays a success or failure alert.
      Specified by:
      onMessageReceive in interface MessageListener<Object>
      Parameters:
      msg - The message object
